---
title: "Gendered Constitutional Debates And Paradoxical Citizenships In Chile 20th-21st Centuries"
date: "2022-01-01"
author: "Hillary Carroll Hiner"
departamento: "Trabajo Social"
categories: ["Proyecto de Investigación"]
concurso: "Fondecyt"
codigo_proyecto: "1220139"
duracion: "48 meses"
url_abstract: "https://post.anid.cl/frontend.php/es/postulacion/descargar/hash/46723e9458b46fa3821558c198810883"
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: file-text
      href: https://post.anid.cl/frontend.php/es/postulacion/descargar/hash/46723e9458b46fa3821558c198810883
---
